{{Infobox location
| name = Vandenyas
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Vandenyas Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Vandenyas is a southern region of the [[Empire]]. Its inhabitants are characterized by having tan or caramel-colored skin and brown hair. The culture includes specific traditions, such as a style of breakfast consisting of fruit and heavy bread, and the use of intricate tattoos that can serve as a record of a family's history. Additionally, certain people from this area are known for being dancers.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Vandenyas]] is a place [[Jyrine]] might be from.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Blackwatch traitor]] has the naturally tan skin of [[Vandenyas]] heritage.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Vandenyas]]-style breakfast is heavy on bread and fruit.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Vandenyas]] is a destination [[Calder Marten]] intends to sail for.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Vandenyas]] is a location.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Vandenyas]] is the home of a carpenter.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Vandenyas]] is the ancestral homeland of [[Jerri]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jyrine]] has the caramel skin of [[Vandenyas]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Vandenyas]] has a [[Navigator]]-style ship that can traverse the [[Deep Aion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
